tools.uppercase: Converts text to uppercase. Args: text
tools.contains: Checks if first string contains second. Args: haystack, needle
tools.length: Returns the length of the string. Args: text
tools.substring: Extracts substring from position with length. Args: text, start, length

prompt: Convert 'hello world' to uppercase, check if it contains 'WORLD', get the length of the original string, then extract first 3 characters from uppercase version.
